name: Angkor Resources Corp.
summary: Angkor Resources Corp. operates as a mineral, and oil and gas exploration company. It explores for gold, silver, and copper deposits on its five mineral exploration licenses covering approximately 983 square kilometer land package in Cambodia. The company also owns an oil and gas exploration license that covers 7,300 square kilometers in Cambodia. The company was formerly known as Angkor Gold Corp. and changed its name to Angkor Resources Corp. in September 2019. Angkor Resources Corp. was incorporated in 2008 and is based in Sexsmith, Canada.
